creator: elvstone@gmail.com
text:
Add a patch from upstream that fixes a segfault on startup in the Perl module. The fix is in upstream SVN trunk and can be removed when the next ZNC is released [1].

Regards,
Elvis

[1] http://znc.svn.sourceforge.net/viewvc/znc?view=rev&revision=1237

Fix: See attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run ZNC on i386 (and maybe other platforms) with the modperl module enabled. It will segfault in the OnLoad method in modperl.cpp.
